cb9abccf-583a-468e-acf0-c5f5689d73cd.label: text_chunk
cb9abccf-583a-468e-acf0-c5f5689d73cd.text:
MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Agreement is between (Party One) having a principal place of business at
and Design 1st Inc. (Party Two) , having its principal place of business at 314 Athlone Ave., Ottawa, Ontario Canada K1Z 5M4.

1. Purpose .

c2173b93-6925-4abc-8bd6-c73c1ac4cf98.label: text_chunk
c2173b93-6925-4abc-8bd6-c73c1ac4cf98.text:
The purpose of this Agreement is to protect the Confidential Information of the parties, as defined below, which is being  disclosed  for  the  purpose  of  a  business  relationship  between  the  parties. Party  One and Party  Two include  its family members, associates, employees, agents, or any other such person or persons individually as well as collectively.

2. Definition .    "Confidential  Information"  includes,

0101c7ec-5ddb-4903-9501-a1c214ca4246.label: text_chunk
0101c7ec-5ddb-4903-9501-a1c214ca4246.text: but  is  not  limited  to  prototypes,    trade  secrets,  intellectual  property, information,  technical  data,  research,  products,  software,  services,  development,  macros,  source  code,  unreleased software, inventions, ideas, processes, designs, drawings, engineering, marketing, markets, customer information, business plans, business policies or practices, forecasts or financial information, team process, design process, part supply,

70c47a38-565b-411b-8b01-7915f9fd7ed8.label: text_chunk
70c47a38-565b-411b-8b01-7915f9fd7ed8.text: pricing, development process and procedures, disclosed by Party One and Party Two under this Agreement which at the time of disclosure  is  designated  as  confidential  (or  like  designation),  is  disclosed  in  circumstances  of  confidence,  or  would  be understood  by  the  parties,  exercising  reasonable  business  judgment,  to  be  confidential.

6d65382c-e4b3-4065-a1a4-710f93de79cb.label: text_chunk
6d65382c-e4b3-4065-a1a4-710f93de79cb.text:
Confidential  Information  shall include, but not be limited to, all materials marked "Confidential Information".

  The confidential business information which is to  be  provided  by Party  One to Party  Two is  the  sole  property  of Party  One, including  but  not  limited  to;  financial information,  printed  material,  marketing  brochures  and  literature,  photographs,  videos,  plans,  methods,

ec10b567-9cfe-438d-8e42-38dbea593de2.label: text_chunk
ec10b567-9cfe-438d-8e42-38dbea593de2.text:
policies  and strategies;  insofar  as  the  same  are  and  remain  confidential  business  information  of Party  One not  generally  known  or available to the public.

3. Disclosure .

34b018a2-9899-4da0-8a2f-dbf6b0bc5cea.label: text_chunk
34b018a2-9899-4da0-8a2f-dbf6b0bc5cea.text: All  disclosures  of  Confidential  Information  (whether  written  or  oral)  by Party  One and Party  Two shall  (a) remain in confidence for a period of three (3) years from the date of disclosure, except that any trade secrets or information with respect to Party One products or research and development will remain in confidence in perpetuity;

909a3459-5699-463c-97c2-d96345a97c6f.label: text_chunk
909a3459-5699-463c-97c2-d96345a97c6f.text: (b) be disclosed only  to  employees  of Party  Two who  have  executed  written  confidentiality  agreements  with  the  employer;  and  (c)  be reproduced or used by Party Two only to the extent necessary to fulfill it’s obligations hereunder.

c682e2f9-a370-4e86-b3cb-7caf53c53bc7.label: text_chunk
c682e2f9-a370-4e86-b3cb-7caf53c53bc7.text: Party One and Party Two shall protect shared Confidential Information with the same degree of care as it normally exercises to protect its own confidential  information  of  similar  nature,  but  at  a  minimum  with  a  reasonable  degree  of  care  to  prevent  its  unauthorized use, dissemination or publication.

ab072b0c-c1c0-4048-adde-1eff3d0f9e22.label: text_chunk
ab072b0c-c1c0-4048-adde-1eff3d0f9e22.text: Each party shall be entitled to disclose Confidential Information of the other party where compelled  by  law  to  so  disclose  pursuant  to  any  legal,  judicial or  administrative  proceeding,  provided  the  disclosing  party provides all reasonable prior notice to the other party to allow it to seek a protective order or other appropriate relief.

0a07c278-4dc2-45f7-9435-575e0d1ad780.label: text_chunk
0a07c278-4dc2-45f7-9435-575e0d1ad780.text:
Party One and Party Two pledges and agrees that it shall keep totally confidential any and all of the said information and other such  matters  arising  hereto,  and  shall  not  disclose  to  any  other  person  or  persons,  corporation,  agent  or  consultant  with whom it is or may be associated with, any such confidential information without express permission being given in writing by an authorized officer of other Party.

4. Use .

a6734730-52a2-4872-88f1-0b15bf0e6ae0.label: text_chunk
a6734730-52a2-4872-88f1-0b15bf0e6ae0.text:
Party One and Party Two each agrees not to use the other party's Confidential Information for its own use or for any purpose except for the purpose described in Section 1. Party One and Party Two each agrees not to disclose the confidential information to others, without the express written permission of the other party.

5. Future Development.

0fd43bb4-4f1e-429a-8013-7c1d1d32491e.label: text_chunk
0fd43bb4-4f1e-429a-8013-7c1d1d32491e.text:
Party Two shall not directly or indirectly acquire any interest in,

 or design, create, manufacture, sell or otherwise deal with any item or product, based upon or derived from the Confidential Information provided by Party One , except as may be expressly agreed to in writing by Party One .

6. Property  Rights,  Return  of  Materials .

5d181f53-286c-4874-bd40-1e120b0fb12b.label: text_chunk
5d181f53-286c-4874-bd40-1e120b0fb12b.text:
All  materials,

  including  Confidential  Information  disclosed  by Party  One and Party Two under this Agreement shall remain the property of the disclosing party.  Each party shall, upon the completion of the purpose of this Agreement or request by the other party, return all materials received or obtained under this Agreement, including Confidential Information, and all copies and all documents containing any portion of any Confidential Information.

7. Disclosure  Required  by  Law .

5075b9de-7c10-4dd6-ac85-02c74a168c74.label: text_chunk
5075b9de-7c10-4dd6-ac85-02c74a168c74.text: Notwithstanding  anything  to  the  contrary  contained  in  paragraphs  3  and  4  hereof,  the Confidential Information may be disclosed to the extent that such disclosure is necessary to comply with any law, regulation, or  order  of  court,  provided  that  each  party  shall  give  the  other  party  reasonable  advance  notice  of  any  such  proposed disclosure,

8c5e86a4-2563-42d0-a62d-648dc3ec1f32.label: text_chunk
8c5e86a4-2563-42d0-a62d-648dc3ec1f32.text: shall  use  its  reasonable  best  efforts  to  secure  an  agreement  in  writing  to  be  bound  by  the  provisions  of paragraphs  3  and  4  of  this  Agreement  from  any  person  obtaining  access  to  the  Confidential  Information  pursuant  to  this paragraph 7, and shall advise the other party in writing of the manner of such disclosure.

124f28a0-045d-4a83-bafe-48832efe14a6.label: text_chunk
124f28a0-045d-4a83-bafe-48832efe14a6.text:
Confidential Document
Design 1st Inc.1

MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

8. Information  Not  Confidential.

 Information  shall  be  deemed  not  to  be  confidential  if  such  information  is  or  becomes publicly known through no wrongful act of the receiving party, or is already known by the receiving party as evidenced by competent  proof  thereof,

01f86816-2f84-49e3-a377-95c6809a5c86.label: text_chunk
01f86816-2f84-49e3-a377-95c6809a5c86.text: or  is  approved  for  release  by  the  prior  written  approval  of  the  disclosing  party,  or  is  rightfully received by the receiving party from a third party without restriction and without breach of this agreement, or is disclosed by the  disclosing  party  to  a  third  party  without  a  similar  restriction  on  the  rights  of  such  third  party,

30412287-3321-4295-80e2-b282089748d4.label: text_chunk
30412287-3321-4295-80e2-b282089748d4.text:
or  is  independently developed by the receiving party without the use of the Confidential Information.

9.

683b07d8-ba01-47a1-ab3c-fa5ccbd20c4f.label: text_chunk
683b07d8-ba01-47a1-ab3c-fa5ccbd20c4f.text:
Non-solicitation: Each party agrees that,

 for a period of 18 months following the date of this Agreement, it shall not solicit to employ or enter into a consulting arrangement with any of the officers, employees, directors or consultants of the other party which whom such party has had contact or were identified to such party in connection with its evaluation of a possible transaction  between  the  parties.

cfdc4613-f972-4afa-92a3-3a562cd874c2.label: text_chunk
cfdc4613-f972-4afa-92a3-3a562cd874c2.text:
The  term  “solicit  to  employ  or  enter  into  a  consulting  arrangement  with”  shall  not  be deemed  to  include  generalized  searches  by Party  One for  employees  or  consultants  through  media  advertisements, employment firms or otherwise, that are not focused on persons employed by or who consult for Party Two .

10. Remedies .

e3e232eb-4567-40e3-a19e-88a658556b34.label: text_chunk
e3e232eb-4567-40e3-a19e-88a658556b34.text: Party  One and Party  Two each  acknowledge  that  compliance  with  the  provisions  of  this  Agreement  is necessary to protect their proprietary interests. Each party further acknowledges that any unauthorized use or disclosure to any person or entity in breach of this Agreement will result in irreparable and continuing damage, and that each party shall be authorized and entitled to obtain immediate injunctive relief and any other rights or remedies to which it may be entitled.

f18d3991-f867-496c-97b2-ebdb3f659349.label: text_chunk
f18d3991-f867-496c-97b2-ebdb3f659349.text:
If  either  party  violates any  of  the  above  agreements,  it  acknowledges  that  money  damages  will be an inadequate  remedy and  that  the  violated  party  will  be  entitled  to specific  performance  or  to  injunctive  relief  to  prohibit  the  violating  party  from continuing to violate this agreement even if no money damages can be proven.

11. Right to Disclose .

1bb82372-8077-435d-978e-c342e50acf4e.label: text_chunk
1bb82372-8077-435d-978e-c342e50acf4e.text: Each party represents and warrants that it has the right to disclose any information provided to the other party in furtherance of the purpose described in Section 1, without violating any agreement with or right of any other person or company.  Confidential Information disclosed by a party hereunder may include Confidential Information of a third party, provided that the third party has authorized such disclosure, and in such event this Agreement shall apply equally to such Confidential Information and shall inure to the benefit of such third party.

8f0dbd11-6423-4951-9ed7-b1bf96382ab9.label: text_chunk
8f0dbd11-6423-4951-9ed7-b1bf96382ab9.text:
12. No License or Business Relationship.

 Nothing in this Agreement shall be construed to as a granting to a party a license under any patent, copyright, trade secret or other intellectual property right now or hereinafter obtained by the other party.

a39f082b-3199-4c94-b3d2-8309152eb499.label: text_chunk
a39f082b-3199-4c94-b3d2-8309152eb499.text:
Further nothing in this Agreement implies a partnership, joint venture or other commercial relationship between the parties, an authorization by for either party to act as agent for the other or an agreement or commitment by either party to purchase, acquire, develop or use the products or services of the other party.

13. Jurisdiction.

 This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Ontario and the laws of Canada applicable therein.

84a128bc-c1fb-4940-99f4-2221c7d1514d.label: text_chunk
84a128bc-c1fb-4940-99f4-2221c7d1514d.text:
Each party hereby attorns to the jurisdiction of Ontario.Confidential Document Design 1st Inc. 2 PARTY TWO PARTY ONE Name Ian Kayser Name Title Director, Operations Title Signature Signature Date: Date:

14. Miscellaneous .

  Failure to enforce any provision of this Agreement shall not constitute a waiver of any term hereof.

e3d43cfb-ccf7-4b0f-a77c-e5ee208ff2f1.label: text_chunk
e3d43cfb-ccf7-4b0f-a77c-e5ee208ff2f1.text:
This Agreement contains the entire agreement of the parties, and supersedes any and all prior understandings, oral or written, with respect to the subject matter hereof.

  This Agreement is binding upon and for the benefit of the parties, their successors and  assigns,  provided  that  the  right  to  Confidential  Information  may  not  be  assigned  without  the  written  consent  of  the respective party.

15. Term .

a3049d66-2f10-4570-97d4-49da81b76595.label: text_chunk
a3049d66-2f10-4570-97d4-49da81b76595.text: This  agreement  shall  remain  in  effect  for  a  period  of  Three  (3)  Years  or  the  life  of  any  Agreements,  Contracts  or Commercial Arrangements which may arise from the joint efforts of the parties hereto, whichever shall be longer.

community_summary.0:
**Summary of Relationships between Party One and Party Two**

1. **Business Relationship**: Party One and Party Two are engaged in a formal business relationship, governed by a contractual agreement that outlines their mutual obligations.

2. **Confidential Information Disclosure**: Party One is responsible for disclosing confidential information to Party Two as part of their agreement. This includes sensitive data related to pricing and development processes, which both parties are obligated to keep confidential.

3. **Ownership and Provision of Information**: Party One owns the confidential business information shared with Party Two and actively provides this information, indicating a transfer of proprietary knowledge. Party Two is restricted from using this information without explicit written consent from Party One.

4. **Collaborative Agreement**: The relationship is characterized by collaboration, where both parties work together under the terms of their agreement to protect and manage shared confidential information.

5. **Protection Obligations**: Party One has agreed to protect the confidential information of Party Two, ensuring compliance with the terms of their agreement to safeguard proprietary interests.

6. **Consulting Arrangement**: Party One is exploring the possibility of entering into a consulting arrangement with individuals or entities associated with Party Two, suggesting a direct professional relationship beyond the existing agreement.

7. **Acknowledgment of Compliance**: Both parties acknowledge the importance of adhering to the provisions of their agreement to maintain the integrity of their proprietary information.

Overall, the relationship between Party One and Party Two is defined by mutual collaboration, confidentiality, and a commitment to protecting shared business interests through a formal agreement.
community_summary.1:
The summary of the relationships involving Design 1st Inc. is as follows:

Design 1st Inc. is a key participant in a Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, highlighting its involvement and commitment to confidentiality in business dealings. This agreement signifies the importance of protecting sensitive information shared between parties, with Design 1st Inc. playing a crucial role in ensuring mutual trust and security in their interactions.
community_summary.2:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph center around a legal Agreement that governs the handling of Confidential Information and involves specific Parties. 

1. **Agreement and Confidential Information**: The Agreement establishes the terms for managing Confidential Information, detailing how access is secured and unauthorized disclosures are prevented.

2. **Agreement and Parties**: The Agreement is a legal document that binds the Parties involved, obligating them to comply with its terms and conditions.

3. **Agreement and Jurisdiction**: The Agreement specifies that it is governed by the laws of Ontario, indicating the legal jurisdiction applicable to the terms outlined.

4. **Binding Nature of the Agreement**: The Agreement is binding on the Parties, meaning they are legally required to adhere to the conditions set forth within the document.

In summary, the Agreement serves as a crucial legal framework that dictates the management of Confidential Information, establishes obligations for the Parties involved, and is governed by Ontario law, ensuring compliance and legal accountability.

community_summary.19: The Whistleblower Protection Act is a significant piece of legislation that amends Title 5 of the United States Code. This relationship underscores the Act's role in promoting transparency and accountability within organizations by providing legal protections to those who come forward with critical information.

3. **Ownership by the United States Government**: The PCII is owned by the entity that possesses it, specifically including the United States Government. This ownership implies that the government is a key stakeholder in the management and disclosure of PCII.

The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) plays a crucial role in managing and protecting sensitive information related to national security. It categorizes information as For Official Use Only (FOUO) to safeguard it from public disclosure, ensuring that sensitive details remain confidential. Additionally, DHS manages Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) to uphold national security and public safety. 

Furthermore, DHS has the authority over Authorized Individuals, who are designated personnel empowered to request the return of information from those who have accessed it, reinforcing the security protocols associated with DHS operations. Overall, these relationships underscore DHS's commitment to protecting sensitive information and maintaining national security.
